title: Qlog QUIC Vocabulary Foundation Verification
scope: Verify the QUIC namespace registration, connection and path lifecycle events, and version and transport-parameter negotiation events.
verification_method: Contract tests and draft-shaped snapshot comparison.
preconditions: The qlog SpecTrace artifacts validate successfully under the repository's JSON validation script.
The core contained writer slice exists.
The recorded draft source revisions have not changed since the plan was authored.
procedure: Run scripts/Validate-SpecTraceJson.ps1 over the qlog canonical artifacts.
Run snapshot or contract tests for lifecycle and negotiation payloads.
Review any drift before expanding to transport or recovery families.
expected_result: The qlog QUIC namespace and lifecycle/negotiation payloads match the draft requirements and remain separate from packet, stream, and recovery slices.
